API Endpoint Verification | Pair Programming Reviews | - | | **Thursday** | Integration Tests
Bug Fix Allocation | Performance Optimization | - | | **Friday** | Release Candidate Testing
Deploy Prep Checklist | Weekly Retrospective
Cleanup for Weekend | Off Days |<|im_end|>
